title: barreria guianensis
intro: Barrera guianensis, also known as the Guianensis Barreria or Guianensis shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Barreria guianensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Barreria guianensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for various health applications.
